items.visual_description: A translucent glass perfume bottle in a deep, rich blue color. It has a slightly rounded rectangular shape, wider at the base. The bottle is topped with a shiny, reflective, cylindrical cap in a matching metallic blue finish.

overall_description: A product shot of a sleek and modern perfume bottle. The bottle features a deep blue, translucent glass body paired with a glossy, metallic blue cap, creating a cohesive and sophisticated look.
